creator: junovitch@freebsd.org
text: I've got an in progress patch for CAN-2004-0941, CVE-2007-0455, CVE-2007-2756, CVE-2007-3472, CVE-2007-3473, CVE-2007-3477, and CVE-2009-3546 based off the patches from CentOS git.  I'm not posting it just yet since I've only validated a build on HEAD so far and I still need further efforts to validate it at runtime before I start moving onto these 2015 CVEs.
